_comment: POST /api/v1/applications — Qdrant vector database, migrating from openclaw to agentsonly (CC-077)
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @applications/qdrant-agentsonly.json http://localhost:8000/api/v1/applications

_schema_review.name: str — application name, used as namespace + HelmRelease name
_schema_review.cluster: str — target cluster; routes to agentsonly-apps and agentsonly-infra repos
_schema_review.chart_name: str — chart name within the repo
_schema_review.chart_version: str — pinned version (1.17.0 from openclaw live state)
_schema_review.values_yaml: str — YAML string, empty = use chart defaults; per-cluster values go here
_schema_review.app_repo_url: Optional[str] — not needed (not a hosted app)

name: qdrant
values_yaml:
replicaCount: 1

persistence:
  enabled: true
  size: 30Gi
  storageClassName: piraeus-datastore

resources:
  requests:
    memory: "2Gi"
    cpu: "500m"
  limits:
    memory: "4Gi"
    cpu: "1000m"

podDisruptionBudget:
  enabled: true
  maxUnavailable: 1
